     The Numbers Business Report

Ricki and the Flash (2015)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $26,839,498Details
International Box Office $14,326,535
Worldwide Box Office $41,166,033
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Ricki is a guitar heroine who gave up everything for her dream of rock-and-roll stardom, but is now returning home to make things right with her family.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$6,618,610 (24.7% of total gross)
Legs:4.06 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:65.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$18,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:1,603 opening theaters/2,064 max. theaters, 4.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $38,078,344

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: August 7th, 2015 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: August 27th, 2015 (Wide) (New Zealand)
August 27th, 2015 (Wide) (Australia)
August 28th, 2015 (Wide) (India)
August 28th, 2015 (Wide) (Spain)
September 2nd, 2015 (Wide) (France)
Video Release: November 24th, 2015 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for thematic material, brief drug content, sexuality and language.
(Rating bulletin 2376, 6/3/2015)
Running Time: 100 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Family Affair, Relatives Playing Relatives
Plot point: Dysfunctional Family, Interracial Romance, Musicians, Romance, Singers
Social setting: Music Industry, Wedding Day
Subgenre: Comedy Drama
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Marc Platt Productions, Badwill Entertainment , LStar Capital
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
